metadata.title: Multi Properties
metadata.description: Adds Properties to multiple notes at once.  Either right-click a folder, or select multiple notes and right-click the selection.

regex.source: Notice("Delimiter must be a single character.")
regex.target: Notice("分隔符必须是单个字符。")

regex.source: Notice("Please check at least one property to remove.")
regex.target: Notice("请检查至少一个要删除的属性。")

regex.source: Notice("No files to add properties to.", 4e3)
regex.target: Notice("没有要添加属性的文件。", 4e3)

regex.source: Notice("No files to remove properties from.", 4e3)
regex.target: Notice("没有要从中删除属性的文件。", 4e3)

regex.source: Type in a property name, then value. Use the dropbox to choose what type of\r\n    data you wish to store.
regex.target: 输入属性名称和值。使用下拉框选择您希望存储的\r\n    数据类型。

regex.source: If you want to make a List property, use the Text data type and separate\r\n    each value with a
regex.target: 如需创建列表属性，请使用文本数据类型并用符号分隔\r\n    每个值。

regex.source: If you want to add Tags, use the name "tags".
regex.target: 如需添加标签，请使用属性名 "tags"。

regex.source: Select the properties you wish to remove from the file selection.
regex.target: 从文件选择中勾选您希望移除的属性。

regex.source: Please select at least one property to remove.
regex.target: 请至少选择一个要移除的属性。

regex.source: The following props will be added:
Are you sure you wish to proceed?
Check if you entered a valid path in the Default Props File setting.
regex.target: 请检查默认属性文件设置中输入的路径是否有效。
函数在组件初始化之外被调用

regex.source: Select a file with properties that you want to load into the Multi Properties form by default.  Type in the full path of the desired file.(ex. Templates/PropFile 1)
regex.target: 选择一个包含属性的文件，该文件将默认载入多属性表单。请输入目标文件的完整路径。(例如：Templates/PropFile 1)
